channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Flooding in Saskatchewan Delays Seeding and Prompts Evacuations
item.description: Parts of Saskatchewan are facing significant delays in spring seeding as widespread flooding affects rural areas, towns, and First Nations communities. The rapid melting of an above-average snowpack h...

item.title: British Nationals Evacuated from Cruise Ship Amid Hantavirus Outbreak
item.description: The UK Foreign Office is coordinating an urgent response to assist British citizens stranded aboard the MV Hondius, a cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak. According to Oceanwide Expeditions,...

item.title: Wildfires Significantly Reduce Recreation and Visitation on Western U.S. Public Lands
item.description: Research on wildfires in Colorado and California reveals that large, high-severity fires have long-lasting effects on outdoor recreation. The Cameron Peak and East Troublesome fires in Colorado, among...

item.title: Shame and stigma prevent South African girls from seeking sexual health care
item.description: In South Africa, shame and incomplete sexual education are major barriers preventing teenage girls and young women from seeking treatment for sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and vaginal infecti...

item.title: DMPR Fixes Diesel Pricing Error, Confirms Lower Increase for May 2026
item.description: The South African Department of Mineral and Petroleum Resources (DMPR) has issued an official correction to the diesel price adjustments that came into effect in May 2026, after identifying a calculat...

item.title: Tropical Storm Hagupit Expected to Enter Philippine Area of Responsibility This Week
item.description: The Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA) has reported that Tropical Storm Hagupit, internationally named, is likely to enter the Philippine Area of Res...

item.title: Western Australia’s extinct koala revealed as distinct species
item.description: In 2024, the Western Australian Museum received a donation of a koala skull collected from Moondyne Cave in Margaret River. The skull showed unusual features, including deep dimples in the cheek regio...

item.title: Aisha Yesufu Joins NDC, Announces Bid for FCT Senatorial Seat
item.description: Prominent activist Aisha Yesufu don comot for African Democratic Congress (ADC) and join Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) as she dey follow her support for presidential aspirant Peter Obi. She announ...

item.title: Documenting Life in the Ukrainian International Legion Through Photography
item.description: Ryan Collins, born in Dahlonega, Georgia in 1989, is an American who joined the Ukrainian International Legion during the 2022 Russian invasion. Originally a ski instructor and founder of a tourism co...

item.title: Allan Reveals the Stories of Island Victims to Lara in Episode 23 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: In Episode 23 of the popular drama series 'Blood vs Duty,' Allan confronts Lara with the harrowing stories of the victims on the island. The episode provides a deep dive into the experiences and strug...

item.title: Study Shows How Genetics and Family Influence Childhood Depression and Anxiety Risk
item.description: A recent study published in Nature Mental Health highlights how childhood depression and anxiety arise from a complex mix of genetics and family environment. Researchers analyzed genetic and mental he...

item.title: Nikita Tszyu Returns to the Ring, Sets Sights on Top Boxing Contenders
item.description: Nikita Tszyu made a notable return to the boxing ring in Newcastle, demonstrating his skills and ambitions for the sport. Known for his technical ability and tactical awareness, Tszyu is now positioni...

item.title: Canadian Privacy Authorities Release Findings on OpenAI ChatGPT Investigation
item.description: OTTAWA — Today, the federal privacy commissioner, along with privacy commissioners from Quebec, Alberta, and British Columbia, are scheduled to release the results of a joint investigation into OpenAI...

item.title: Impact of War on Black Sea Marine Life and Dolphins
item.description: The ongoing conflict in Ukraine is having severe consequences on marine life in the Black Sea. Reports indicate that Russian military forces may be using dolphins for combat and protection around the ...

item.title: Adelaide Flight School Responds Following Fatal Parafield Airport Crash
item.description: A tragic incident at Parafield Airport in Adelaide on April 29 claimed the lives of a flight instructor, 29-year-old Robert 'Rob' Hoyle, and a trainee pilot. The Diamond DA42 training aircraft crashed...

item.title: Mombasa Residents Hold Peaceful Protest Demanding Action Against Femicide
item.description: On Wednesday, May 6, Mombasa residents took to the streets to protest the rising cases of femicide in the region. The peaceful demonstration was led by the activist group VOCAL Africa, which called on...

item.title: Joburg fine dining event organisers fail to refund cancelled tickets
item.description: Modelane Long Table, a well-known Joburg pop-up dining experience, is facing serious consumer complaints after failing to refund tickets for its cancelled September 2025 event. Customers paid R750 per...

item.title: ACF suspends BoT Chairman pending probe over constitutional breaches
item.description: The Arewa Consultative Forum (ACF) don suspend the Chairman of their Board of Trustees, Alhaji Bashir M. Dalhatu, after the National Executive Committee (NEC) find say e breach the organisation's cons...

item.title: Senate Approves Tegbe and Enikanolaiye for Ministerial Positions
item.description: The Nigerian Senate don confirm Joseph Olasunkanmi Tegbe and Ambassador Sola Enikanolaiye as Ministers of the Federal Republic of Nigeria after their screening at the Committee of the Whole on Wednesd...

item.title: FBI Executes Search Warrants at Office of Virginia State Senator L. Louise Lucas
item.description: On Wednesday, May 6, 2026, federal agents from the FBI executed court-authorized search warrants at the Portsmouth, Virginia, office of Democratic state Senator L. Louise Lucas. This action is part of...
